class Solution:
    def minimumScore(self, s: str, t: str) -> int:
        def compute_prefix(s, t):
            i = 0
            j = 0
            while i < len(s) and j < len(t):
                if s[i] == t[j]:
                    j += 1
                i += 1
            return j
        
        def compute_suffix(s, t):
            i = len(s) - 1
            j = len(t) - 1
            while i >= 0 and j >= 0:
                if s[i] == t[j]:
                    j -= 1
                i -= 1
            return len(t) - j - 1
        
        pre_len = compute_prefix(s, t)
        suf_len = compute_suffix(s, t)
        score = len(t) - pre_len - suf_len
        return max(0, score)

def minimumScore(self, s: str, t: str) -> int:
        def compute_prefix(s, t):
            i = 0
            j = 0
            while i < len(s) and j < len(t):
                if s[i] == t[j]:
                    j += 1
                i += 1
            return j
        
        def compute_suffix(s, t):
            i = len(s) - 1
            j = len(t) - 1
            while i >= 0 and j >= 0:
                if s[i] == t[j]:
                    j -= 1
                i -= 1
            return len(t) - j - 1
        
        pre_len = compute_prefix(s, t)
        suf_len = compute_suffix(s, t)
        score = len(t) - pre_len - suf_len
        return max(0, score)

                    j -= 1
                i -= 1
            return len(t) - j - 1

        score = len(t) - pre_len - suf_len
        return max(0, score)
